headline: 143-year-old grocery chain closes more locations, lays off dozens
summary: Grocery store chains regularly evaluate their portfolios to determine whether underperforming or unprofitable units need to be closed. Chains will often shut down stores when a site’s lease is set to expire. In severe cases, a company might close a location long before a lease expires if it no ...
